effect.subject: all_caps_casing
effect.reserved_for: campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE' and chart/infographic headlines only

rule_text: [GENERAL] Do not use ALL CAPS for body copy, buttons, or subheads other than the allowed cases (campaign headline and chart/infographic headlines).
intent: Restrict all-caps to the sanctioned exceptions.
summary: No ALL CAPS in body copy, buttons, subheads except campaign headlines and chart/infographic headlines.
